In rerun::external::re_renderer::external::bytemuck::__core::future

rerun::external::re_renderer::external::bytemuck::__core::future

Function pending

1.48.0 · Source 
pub fn pending<T>() -> Pending<T> ⓘ
Expand description

Creates a future which never resolves, representing a computation that never finishes.

§Examples

use std::future;

let future = future::pending();
let () = future.await;
unreachable!();
